query:
SELECT p.name, s.item_key, s.section, s.distribution_method, s.start_month, s.end_month, s.lump_sum_month, s.funding_source
FROM projects p
JOIN project_cash_flow_settings s ON s.project_id = p.id AND s.scenario = COALESCE(p.financingScenario, 'offplan_escrow') AND s.is_active = 1
WHERE p.name LIKE '%قطعة 1%' AND s.section = 'construction'
ORDER BY s.sort_order
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT p.name, s.item_key, s.section, s.distribution_method, s.start_month, s.end_month, s.lump_sum_month, s.funding_source
FROM projects p
JOIN project_cash_flow_settings s ON s.project_id = p.id AND s.scenario = COALESCE(p.financingScenario, 'offplan_escrow') AND s.is_active = 1
WHERE p.name LIKE '%قطعة 1%' AND s.section = 'construction'
ORDER BY s.sort_order
